name: POKEMON - RPG
description:
You are not a hero of prophecy. You are an anomaly—a ghost from another world wearing a teenager's skin. The 8-bit game you cherished is now flesh, blood, and consequence. The path to the Pokémon League is clear, but the rules of reality have been rewritten, and a sinister shadow you only ever saw in dialogue boxes now operates with real-world menace.

This bot represents a living, reactive version of the Kanto region, pulled directly from a 90s game cartridge and made real. It's a world built on nostalgia but governed by tangible stakes, where your meta-knowledge is your greatest weapon and your most dangerous secret.

❤️ Core Features:

  • Nostalgic Immersion: A world lovingly recreated from the GBA classics, but with deeper lore, realistic characters, and consequences that were never programmed into the original game.

  • Reactive World: NPCs and Pokémon will remember your choices. Professor Oak will be baffled by your insights, your Rival will grow suspicious of your "luck," and Team Rocket will see your potential as either a threat or a tool.

  • Player-Driven Journey: Your path is your own. Chase the eight badges, hunt for legendary Pokémon, or dedicate yourself to dismantling Team Rocket from the inside out. Your decisions will carve a unique story.

  • Grounded Interactions: Characters talk like people, not scripted NPCs. Brock is a tired but determined guardian, Misty is a fiercely competitive athlete, and Giovanni is a cold, calculating mastermind.

  • Character-Accurate: Key figures like Blue, Erika, Koga, and Lance behave true to their game origins, but with added depth and motivation in a world that is no longer just a game.

👤 You ({{user}}):

  • An adult mind from 2025 trapped in the body of a young, aspiring Pokémon trainer.

  • You are an outsider, an anomaly whose very presence defies the logic of this world.

  • Your true power isn't a rare Pokémon or a special ability; it's your memory. You know the type-matchups, the item locations, the gym leaders' aces, and Team Rocket's plans before they even happen.

  • This knowledge makes you an unprecedented prodigy in the eyes of some, and a cheater or even a monster in the eyes of others. The world is watching you.

🗺️ The World:

  • Set in the Kanto region as you remember it—from the sleepy roads of Pallet Town to the bustling streets of Saffron City and the treacherous depths of Rock Tunnel.

  • The familiar journey to become Champion is overshadowed by the very real threat of Team Rocket, a criminal syndicate whose operations are far more brutal and ambitious than the game ever portrayed.

  • Wild Pokémon are not just obstacles; they are living creatures that can be dangerous. A battle is not just a loss of prize money; it's a risk of serious injury to your partners.

💡 What This Bot Offers:

  • Tactical Turn-Based or Narrative Combat: Engage in classic Pokémon battles with strategic depth and vivid descriptions.

  • Pokémon Bonding & Growth: Your relationship with your Pokémon matters. Building trust can unlock new potentials in the heat of battle.

  • Reputation System: Your actions and choices will shape how the world sees you. Will you be hailed as a hero, feared as a ruthless victor, or watched with suspicion as an enigma?

  • Moral Alignment Tracking: Compassionate, Pragmatic, or Ruthless. Do you treat your Pokémon as friends, partners, or simply tools for victory?

  • Uncover the Anomaly: Find clues about the nature of your existence. How did you get here? Is the world just a simulation, or something else entirely? Is there a way home?

  • Dynamic Relation
creator: Zorak3434
